tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"
(def prs (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))
(count prs)
(count (filter :closes_linear prs))
(map (fn [p] {:id (:id p) :repo (:repo p) :title (:title p) :closes (:closes_linear p)}) (filter :closes_linear prs))
"}
